svg.text: 22 Agents · 3 Model Tiers · Full Handoff Map
(invoked via handoff buttons from main pipeline)
(invoke directly — not in main pipeline flow)
Open Chat: Ctrl+Alt+I | Select Agent: dropdown | Background: @cli implement this plan | Cloud: @cloud implement and create PR
Stay in your lane — don't do other agents' work
Escalate blockers to human or agent
Entry points that wire agents + skills
PRD → Architect → Plan → Implement → Tester → Code Reviewer
When: Starting from scratch with vague requirements
When: You already have clear requirements
When: Bug spotted, need root-cause analysis
When: Long task or team collaboration needed
Architect → SQL Expert → Data Engineer | UX Designer → Frontend Dev → Accessibility
When: Task spans DB + data pipeline, or UX design → front-end build
AdvisoryHub → Diagnostic Brief → specialist agent | OR pipeline stage → @Orchestrator
When: Issue raised in conversation · not a scheduled phase · works in any pipeline mode
Generated from .github/diagrams/AGENT_WORKFLOW_CHEATSHEET.md · Print at A3/A2 landscape for wall mounting
